jsonLd.title: Opening for Teacher at Unacademy
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Teacher looking for your next big career move? Unacademy in Kanpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Unacademy:
Unacademy is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Unacademy!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
